modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer is showing as offline and not printing.

full_description_text:  
I have a printer at my desk. It’s connected to my laptop through a docking station. But right now, it says it’s offline. I tried to print something, but nothing happens. The printer just won’t work. It’s really frustrating because I need to print documents.
short_description: Printer is showing as offline and not printing.
description: I have a printer at my desk. It’s connected to my laptop through a docking station. But right now, it says it’s offline. I tried to print something, but nothing happens. The printer just won’t work. It’s really frustrating because I need to print documents.
